title: Amtech B3186 Mini Long Nose Plier with Spring, Black Silver & Red, 15cm
features: DURABLE AND COMFORTABLE: This spring loaded mini long nose pliers are made from drop forged steel and have comfortable non-slip grips
VERSATILE: It is ideal for a wide range of precision hobby and DIY work
COMPACT DESIGN: Balanced design for control and ease of use.
ERGONOMIC NON-SLIP GRIP: For comfort and control during use.
COMPACT DESIGN: Versatile tool for carpentry, assembly, and general household repairs.
description: From the manufacturer Why Amtech? Amtech has a fantastic range of essential tools for all your home, garage and DIY requirements. Keep your outdoor living area looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Reasons to Buy!! Multi-Use : This Mini long nose plier can be used for various purposes, including jewellery making, electronic repairs, crafting, and much more. Comfort : This plier is very easy to use because of its lightweight construction, comfortable grip, and non-slip handles. Sturdy body : It has a heat-treated steel construction body that makes this tool strong and durable. Precision : This tool is also ideal for carrying out precision work, such as, trimming, stripping, and cutting wires or cables.
